source.note: 2026-07-11 correction (fetched libs/gi/sheets/src/Characters/Furina/index.tsx + Data/Characters/Furina/skillParam.json from frzyc/genshin-optimizer, commit above): the E (Salon Solitaire) previously only had one fabricated ATK-scaling 'skillDmg' hit — GO's dmgFormulas.skill has FOUR distinct HP-scaling summon hits (bubbleDmg = the free cast-time burst, usherDmg/chevalDmg/crabDmg = the Usher/Cheval/Crab members, each HP-scaling per dmgNode('hp', ...)), 'crabDmg' being the one leaderboards reference. Added all four with scalingKey 'hp' (was wrongly 'atk'). Also fixed burst.hit1 scalingKey atk->hp (GO's burst.skillDmg is also dmgNode('hp', ...) — Furina's whole kit scales off Max HP, not ATK). Modeled the Salon Solitaire 'number of members summoned' selector (GO's member_mult_, 1-4 stacks each worth 1+0.1*stack) as a self-conditional salonmember_dmg_ bonus (0.1/0.2/0.3/0.4), included only in usher/cheval/crab's dmgBonusKeys (matches Nahida's karmadmg_dmg_ pattern for a hit-family-scoped bonus bucket) — an additive-stacking approximation of what's really a multiplicative factor, consistent with how this codebase models other stack mechanics (e.g. Cyno C2 stellarconduct_dmg_). 2026-07-15 follow-up: implemented the previously-flagged A4 passive (Unheard Confession) — confirmed via community wiki (not GO's ambiguous percent()/1000 sheet unit) that it's +0.7% Salon Member DMG per 1000 Max HP, capped at 28% (reached at 40,000 HP). Added as a new dynamic stat-conversion pair (salonmember_dmg_from_hp_ = 0.000007, salonmember_dmg_from_hp_cap_ = 0.28) in apply_stat_conversions/_batch, so it scales off each build's actual total HP rather than a static formulaRef reference value — stacks additively with the member-count bonus above onto the same salonmember_dmg_ key, matching how the two are separate additive sources in-game. A4's other effect (Singer of Many Waters healing-interval reduction) is a utility/healing stat with no damage impact, so it's intentionally not modeled here. 2026-07-15 correction: salonNumMembers' member-count bonus and the A4 HP-scaling bonus were both writing into salonmember_dmg_, which is a normal (additive) %DMG-bonus bucket -- correct for A4 (a real %DMG bonus per the wiki), but wrong for the member-count selector, which is actually a base-DMG multiplier (GO's member_mult_ = 1 + 0.1*stack, applied before %DMG bonuses, not summed alongside them) -- the original note already flagged this as 'an additive-stacking approximation of what's really a multiplicative factor'. Added a dedicated salonmember_base_dmg_ key to BASE_DMG_MULT_KEYS (damage_evaluator_service.py, shared with the batch evaluator) scoped to just Usher/Cheval/Crab (not skill_base_dmg_, which would also leak onto the unrelated Bubble hit), and switched salonNumMembers' states to set that key instead. The two mechanisms now compose correctly: base_dmg *= (1 + memberCount base mult) happens first, then (dmg_bonus_sum incl. salonmember_dmg_ from A4) is applied on top -- matching the true nested-multiplier structure instead of flattening both into one additive sum, which previously undercounted the member-count bonus whenever other %DMG bonuses (team buffs, artifacts, weapon) were also present.

self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Salon Solitaire (E): number of extra Fontainian members summoned by consuming Max HP. GO's member_mult_ (1 + 0.1*stack) is a genuine base-DMG multiplier on that member's summon hit (Usher/Cheval/Crab only, not the free Bubble hit) -- modeled via salonmember_base_dmg_ (BASE_DMG_MULT_KEYS in damage_evaluator_service.py), applied to base_dmg before the %DMG-bonus stage, not the salonmember_dmg_ %DMG-bonus bucket. Distinct from (and stacks correctly under) the unconditional A4 Unheard Confession HP-scaling bonus, which IS a normal %DMG bonus and belongs in salonmember_dmg_ (self_modifiers_json above).

C2 (A Woman Adapts Like a Duckweed in Water): while Let the People Rejoice (burst) lasts, Furina's Fanfare gain from nearby characters' HP fluctuations is increased by 250%, letting Fanfare exceed the base 400-point cap. Each point of Fanfare above 400 grants Furina +0.35% Max HP, capping at +140% Max HP (400 excess points). Select excess Fanfare stacks (points above 400).

team_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Burst fanfare stacks: each stack provides DMG bonus
